name: @midnight-experiments/attest-integration-tests
description: Live benchmark suite for the attest experiment: deploys the simulated signet attestation contract against the local Midnight stack and drives the map-only, ECDSA-only, SHA-256 and keccak variants through the instrumented proof provider. Gated by RUN_INTEGRATION_TESTS; requires `yarn compile:zk` output and a running node + indexer + proof server.
